data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WantKingsRockStevenGav: I got this from STEVEN, but I don't\nknow what it's good for.\pI think it's called KING'S ROCK.\nDo you want it?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_YouCanKeepIt: Why would you want it?\nYou're weird.\pYou can keep it, but keep it a secret\nfrom STEVEN.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_CollectingRocks: Is it really that fun collecting\nrocks? I don't get it.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WhatToDoWithWeirdRock: Yeah, you think so, too! What are you\nsupposed to do with some weird rock?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WailmerWatching: Around MOSSDEEP, you can see wild\nWAILMER.\pIt's called, uh...\nWhat was it now...\pWAI, WAI, WAI...\pWAILMER watching!
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterLaunchingRo: The island's SPACE CENTER has been\nlaunching huge rockets.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WailmerDisappeared: I'd heard from my mates in LILYCOVE\nthat the herd of WAILMER has\ldisappeared.\pWhat went down over there, I wonder?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_NiceIfWorldCoveredByFl: Wouldn't it be nice?\pIf the whole world was covered in\nplants and flowers like this island?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_LifeNeedsSeaToLive:
All life needs the sea to live, even
though it makes its home on the land.\pLife, having run its course, becomes
soil and returns to the land.\pAnd the sea is always connected to
the land.\pYes, like the very shoreline here.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SurfExhilarating: A voyage on a ship is fine.\pBut crossing the sea with POKéMON\nusing SURF...\pNow that's an exhilarating trip!\nWouldn't you agree, youngster?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpecialSpaceCenterRock:
This rock has a special meaning to
the people at the SPACE CENTER.\pThey put it here as their wish for
their rockets to fly safely.\pWhen you make a wish, what do you use?
Do you wish upon a star?\pI use a wish tag to make it happen.
That's what I do.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_GymSign: MOSSDEEP CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADERS: LIZA & TATE\p“The mystic combination!”
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterSign: MOSSDEEP SPACE CENTER\n“The closest place to space.”
